description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) server configuration for Live Video Alert Agent

servers.name: prometheus
servers.description: Prometheus MCP Server - query metrics, get alerts, analyze system performance

tool_defaults._note: Default arguments for each tool. Supports {{variable}} template placeholders rendered from alert context (stream_id, alert_name, severity, answer, reason, consecutive_count, escalated, snapshot_path). Tools not listed here, or listed with empty {}, are called with no arguments.

_prometheus_docker_run._note: Run the Prometheus MCP server with Docker before enabling
